brand.name: Heita
brand.tagline: Ukwethembeka, imiyalezo, nezindawo zokusebenza ze-AI ohlelweni olulodwa oluqala ngomakhalekhukhwini.

landing.intro: I-Heita inika abathengisi namabhizinisi amancane indlela eqondile yokuxhumana namakhasimende awo — nge-WhatsApp, i-QR, nohlelo olusheshayo olufakekayo olusebenza ngedatha esetshenziswa ngabantu baseNingizimu Afrika.

features.joinDescription: Amakhodi e-QR esitolo, kumarisidi, kumathebula emikhiqizo, emlayezweni we-WhatsApp, noma kusixhumanisi esiqondile — konke kuholela kuphrofayela yebhizinisi efanayo.
features.messagingDescription: I-SMS, i-WhatsApp, i-push, nezaziso zangaphakathi kuhlangana kumugqa owodwa wekhasimende, ophethwe ithimba lakho.
features.aiDescription: Isitolo ngasinye sifundisa i-AI esekelwe kumadokhumenti aso, i-catalogue, ama-FAQ, nezinqubomgomo. I-Ollama ngokuzenzakalelayo, bese kuba ne-cloud fallback lapho kudingeka.
features.loyaltyDescription: Amazinga, imivuzo, izithakazelo, izimali zokubhalisa, nezikhumbuzi zemicimbi, konke kuxhunywe kuwallethi eyodwa ikhasimende lakho elingayithwala noma kuphi.
features.pwaDescription: Iyafakeka, iyasebenza noma ungaxhunyiwe, futhi iyashesha ngedatha esetshenziswa ngabantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Akukho ukuvinjelwa yisitolo sohlelo lokusebenza.
features.trustDescription: Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-webhook ye-WhatsApp, ama-OTP anemingcele, i-CSP evalekile, nokuqhelelana kwabaqashi ngezinqubomgomo zamarowu.

auth.signInBlurb: Sikhipha amakhodi okungena ezinombolweni zocingo eziqinisekisiwe kuphela. Amakhasimende amasha kumele aqale adale i-akhawunti.
auth.signUpBlurb: Siqinisekisa inombolo yakho yocingo ngaphambi kokudala i-akhawunti ukuze ama-SIM asetshenziswe kabusha angathathi ubuwena buthule.
auth.providerSuffix: Ukungena nge-Google ne-Apple kuvela ngokuzenzakalela uma sekumiswe.
auth.footerSecurity: Inemingcele · I-HMAC isayiniwe · Iphela emizuzwini eyi-10
auth.errorOAuthEmailMissing: I-akhawunti yakho ye-Google noma ye-Apple ayabelananga ngekheli le-imeyili. Ngena ngenombolo yakho yocingo esikhundleni salokho.
auth.errorAccountDeactivated: Le akhawunti ivaliwe. Xhumana no-support@heita.co.za uma ucabanga ukuthi lokhu kuyiphutha.
auth.errorOAuthAccountLinkRequired: I-akhawunti isivele ikhona ngaleli kheli le-imeyili. Ngena kuqala ngocingo lwakho bese uxhumanisa i-Google noma i-Apple kuphrofayela yakho.

home.summarySingle: Uyilungu kubhizinisi elingu-{count} futhi unamaphuzu angu-{points} kuwallethi yakho.
home.summaryPlural: Uyilungu kumabhizinisi angu-{count} futhi unamaphuzu angu-{points} kuwallethi yakho.
home.searchPlaceholder: Thola ibhizinisi ngegama, indawo, noma isigaba…
home.discoveryMatches: {count, plural, =0 {0 okufanayo} one {1 okufanayo} other {# okufanayo}}
home.noResults: Awekho amabhizinisi womphakathi afanise lokhu kusesha. Zama isigaba noma indawo.
home.emptyBody: Skena ikhodi ye-QR esitolo esibambisene, vula isixhumanisi sokujoyina se-WhatsApp, noma chofoza inkinobho yokujoyina kuphrofayela yebhizinisi ukuze uqale ukuthola amaphuzu.

wallet.totalPoints: Amaphuzu esewonke kumabhizinisi angu-{count, plural, one {#} other {#}}
wallet.emptyBody: Joyina ibhizinisi ukuze ubone amaphuzu nemivuzo yakho lapha.

notifications.title: Izibuyekezo zakamuva
notifications.blurb: Ukukhuphuka kwamazinga, ukuhlengwa, izikhumbuzi zemicimbi, nezimpendulo zebhothi kuvela lapha.

profile.dangerBody: Ukususa i-akhawunti yakho manje kuqala iwindi lezinsuku ezingu-30 lokususa, kukhansele ubulungu obusebenzayo, futhi kususe izimvume ezisebenzayo.

profileSettings.title: Izilungiselelo ze-akhawunti
profileSettings.downloadStarted: Ukulandwa kokukhishwa kwedatha ye-akhawunti yakho sekuqalile.
profileSettings.downloadError: Asikwazanga ukulungiselela ukukhishwa kwedatha ye-akhawunti yakho.
profileSettings.confirmDelete: Susa i-akhawunti yakho ye-Heita? Lokhu kuzokhanisela ubulungu obusebenzayo futhi kuqale inqubo yokususa.

notificationPreferences.title: Izintandokazi zezaziso
notificationPreferences.description: Khetha ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo lokuxhumana ibhizinisi ngalinye elingalusebenzisa uma lithumela izibuyekezo kuwe. Amahora athule amisa i-push ne-imeyili, kodwa okusesiphakelini sangaphakathi kuhlala kutholakala.
notificationPreferences.emptyState: Joyina ibhizinisi ukuze uphathe izintandokazi zezaziso zebhizinisi ngalinye.

quietHours.enabled: Misa i-push ne-imeyili phakathi kwamahora athule

cookieConsent.title: Izinketho zamakhukhi
cookieConsent.body: I-Heita isebenzisa amakhukhi abalulekile ukuze ungene, kuvikelwe ukuphepha, futhi kuqhubeke iseshini. Ungakhetha ukuthi singawasebenzisa yini amakhukhi angewona abalulekile ezibuyekezweni zesikhathi esizayo nasekuthuthukiseni umkhiqizo.

businessProfile.joinPrompt: Ngena, joyina, bese uqala ukuqoqa njalo uma uvakashela.

dashboard.heroBlurb: Phatha ukwethembeka, izingxoxo, ne-AI endaweni eyodwa.
dashboard.activitySummary: Kudluliselwe imiyalezo engu-{messages} yonke · kuqoshwe ukuthengiselana kokwethembeka okungu-{transactions}.

promotions.title: Izikhuthazi
promotions.subtitle: Hlela imikhankaso enesikhathi esinqunyiwe, amakhodi, nokusakaza okuqondiswe emazingeni — kuyobonakala ezazisweni zamakhasimende akho.
promotions.broadcastDescription: Ukusakaza kuthumela lesi sikhuthazi njengesaziso kuwo wonke amalungu afanele. Hlola izethameli kuqala — akukho ukubuyela emuva.
promotions.emptyState: Akukho zikhuthazi okwamanje. Dala umkhankaso wakho wokuqala ngenhla.
promotions.noTiers: Awekho amazinga okwethembeka amisiwe kuleli bhizinisi.
promotions.tierTargetsHint: Shiya kungenalutho ukuze kuthunyelwe kuwo wonke amalungu asebenzayo. Khetha amazinga ukuze ukhawulele izethameli.

events.title: Imicimbi
events.subtitle: Hlela imicimbi esitolo, ukwethulwa, nokuhlangana. Izikhumbuzi zikhishwa nge-WhatsApp, push, nohlelo.
events.emptyUpcoming: Akukho micimbi ezayo. Hlela owakho wokuqala ngenhla.

publicEvents.title: Okuzayo
publicEvents.subtitle: Izikhumbuzi zithunyelwa ngosuku olungaphambi komcimbi nge-WhatsApp, push, nangaphakathi kuhlelo.

receiptHistory.title: Umlando wamaphuzu nokuhlenga
receiptHistory.subtitle: Bheka konke ukuthengiselana kokwethembeka kwaleli bhizinisi bese ukulanda uma udinga irekhodi elicacile.
